spec.name: The Entrance To The Shadow Grove
spec.description: Before you, the grove of shadows lies. Giant grey trees are all that can be seen through the thick shadows. A great sense of both power and menace permeates the surrounding area. You have a strange urge to turn back and go back the way you've come. A small path leads north into the shadows and back south to the plains.

south.description: The copse of trees and plains are back to the south.
